_meta.purpose: Per-module deterministic validation checklist for AI and human contributors.

required_checks: Keep class HomePage as CatalogPageBase subclass
Do not import from ui.jaw_page_support
Preserve signal behavior for item_selected and item_deleted
Run python scripts/module_extension_checker.py
Run python scripts/run_quality_gate.py
Keep class JawPage as CatalogPageBase subclass
Do not import from ui.home_page_support
Preserve signal behavior for jaw_selected and jaw_deleted
Run python scripts/module_extension_checker.py
Run python scripts/run_quality_gate.py
Keep class JawCatalogDelegate as CatalogDelegate subclass
Preserve _compute_size and _paint_item_content overrides
Preserve role mapping to CATALOG_ROLE_* constants
Run python scripts/module_extension_checker.py
Keep __all__ in sync with exported platform classes
Do not introduce app-specific imports from Tools and jaws Library
Update docs/module-extension-points.json when extension rules change
Run python scripts/import_path_checker.py
Run python scripts/module_extension_checker.py
Keep old public API names exported for compatibility
Allow additive-only schema migrations in tools_migrations and jaws_migrations
Validate both create_or_migrate_schema and migrate_jaws_schema call paths
Run python scripts/smoke_test.py
Run python scripts/run_quality_gate.py
